title: pleomele timorensis
intro: Pleomele timorensis, also known as the Timor cordyline, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asparagaceae. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in Eastern Indonesia, where it is used to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Pleomele timorensis include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which have been shown to aid in wound healing, reduce pain and inflammation, and even exhibit antiviral activity. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea or infused in hot water to make a medicinal drink, or dried and powdered to be used in herbal preparations such as capsules or topical creams.
